_status_note: verified_in_runner = _buildBookingPacketHtml presence confirmed in source. Actual packet content (does it include time and price?) requires live/snapshot testing to verify fully.
title: Confirmation summary must include time and price — no vague 'booking received' message
failing_behavior: Early flow showed only 'Your appointment request has been sent. The salon will confirm shortly.' — no time, no price, no reference ID. Customer had no confirmation of what was booked.
root_cause: Original EscalationEngine.create() wrote to 'escalations' and showed a pending-confirmation message. Replaced by _submitDirectBooking which generates a full booking packet (service, staff, date, time, price, ref ID, calendar links) immediately.
precondition: biz._bookingDraft = {services:['Gel Manicure'], staff:'Tracy', date:'2026-04-13', time:'14:00', name:'Sarah', phone:'4085559876', lang:'en'}. Slot available. [ESCALATE:appointment] emitted.
notes: _buildBookingPacketHtml renders service/staff/date/time/price/location/phone/ref + calendar buttons. _buildConfirmedNatural provides the text message above. Both shown immediately on booking confirm — no vendor wait.
